prompt:
创意改写这里，我希望有一个输入框，让用户输出产品的描述，然后在左上角支持上传图片，然后先按照1. 告别沉重：跑步者的减重方案

Hook：(视觉) 慢动作展示手机从口袋滑落摔碎，对比轻盈的 MP3 握在手中。(文案) “别再带着这块‘砖头’跑步了！”
Concept：第一人称 POV 视角。创作者展示将沉重的手机扔在沙发上，只带上 JOLIKE M5 和蓝牙耳机出门。镜头特写蓝牙 5.3 秒连耳机的过程，以及在全触控屏上丝滑切换歌曲和开启计步器的操作，最后展示在夕阳下无负担奔跑的背影。
Why it fits：精准击中健身人群“手机太重、易碎、干扰运动”的痛点，通过强烈的视觉对比强化“轻量化运动自由”。
2. 沉浸式学习：拒绝手机分心

Hook：(视觉) 手机屏幕不断弹出社交媒体通知，创作者烦躁地将其反扣。 (文案) “这就是你考前复习效率低的原因。”
Concept：分屏对比或转场。左边是手机干扰下的混乱学习状态；右边是只有 JOLIKE M5、笔记本和咖啡的极简桌面。展示全触控屏翻阅电子书、使用高清录音功能记录重点，强调“No WiFi”带来的绝对专注力。
Why it fits：利用“数码排毒（Digital Detox）”趋势，针对学生和备考族对“专注力”的渴望，将产品定位为高效学习的生产力工具。
3. 丝滑触控：数码解压 ASMR

Hook：(视觉) 近距离微距拍摄手指划过屏幕的瞬间，伴随清脆的系统提示音。(文案) “谁能拒绝这种丝滑的触控感？”
Concept：沉浸式 ASMR 风格。全片无背景音乐，只保留环境音。特写镜头展示：撕开屏幕贴膜、手指在全触控屏上流畅滑动切换 UI、蓝牙 5.3 瞬间配对成功的提示音、金属外壳与桌面碰撞的质感声。
Why it fits：参考 EchoTik 热卖模式，利用高质感视觉和听觉刺激建立产品的高级感和溢价感，吸引对数码硬件质感有要求的受众。
4. 蓝牙 5.3 极限稳定性挑战

Hook：(视觉) 创作者将 MP3 放在操场起点，自己跑向远处，耳机里的音乐依然在响。(文案) “蓝牙 5.3 的连接距离到底有多离谱？”
Concept：实测挑战类视频。创作者在健身房或操场进行测试，展示 MP3 放在器械架上，自己走动、深蹲、大幅度摆臂，音乐始终没有断连或卡顿。特写计步器数据随着运动精准跳动。
Why it fits：针对用户对蓝牙耳机断连的恐惧，通过“极限测试”直观证明蓝牙 5.3 的技术优势，建立性能信任。
5. 睡前仪式感：无屏干扰的治愈

Hook：(视觉) 昏暗温馨的卧室灯光，创作者关掉手机放入抽屉。(文案) “这是我睡前不看手机的第 7 天，感觉太棒了。”
Concept：生活方式 VLOG。展示睡前使用 JOLIKE M5 听播客或轻音乐的画面。特写全触控屏调节音量的柔和光线，强调没有社交媒体推送、没有蓝光伤眼，只有纯净的音频陪伴入睡。
Why it fits：切中“睡前焦虑”和“助眠神器”的细分场景，将 MP3 从单纯的播放器升华为一种健康、治愈的生活方式单品。，这种格式让大模型生成多个创意角度，然后根据每个创意角度，按照Prompt 1: The Commute Escape [Style] Raw authentic phone footage, casual selfie style, front-facing camera, slight natural shakiness, 4K. Ins-style Caucasian female blogger, striking amber eyes, messy blonde beach waves, scattered freckles, wearing oversized trench coat and sneakers, energetic vibe. [Prose] Y1 player: sleek, ultra-thin, 64g card-sized, matte metallic, crisp touchscreen. Environments: crowded noisy subway transitions to peaceful sunlit city stroll. Blogger uses Y1 to escape urban chaos. [Cinematography] Handheld selfie POV, slight motion blur, macro close-ups of Y1 screen switching FLAC tracks, vlog-style framing. [Lighting] Harsh fluorescent subway light shifts to warm golden hour daylight. Palette: Muted underground greys to vibrant street autumn tones. 4000K to 5500K. [Actions] 0-3s Selfie frame, blogger on crowded subway, talks to camera, pulls Y1 from tiny cardholder, contrasts with huge phone. 3-7s Flips camera to Y1 close-up, scrolling FLAC/APE playlists, then back to selfie. 7-10s Steps off train into sunlight, serene smile, Y1 in hand. 10-15s Slips Y1 into tight jeans pocket effortlessly, turns back to selfie, bright smile, points to pocket. [Audio] VO: "Subway chaos? Not on my watch, loves. Y1 slips into my cardholder, 64g of pure escape. FLAC lossless is a private concert. 25 hours battery? My playlist never dies. Upgrade your commute, click link!" SFX: Muffled train noise, crisp earphone click, high-fidelity upbeat pop, city sounds.

Prompt 2: The Library Focus [Style] Raw authentic phone footage, casual selfie style, front-facing camera, intimate vlog angle, 4K. Ins-style Caucasian female blogger, soft brown doe eyes, auburn hair in claw clip, rosy bare cheeks, wearing cozy oversized knit sweater, calm demeanor. [Prose] Y1 player: sleek, 64g, crisp touchscreen. Environment: quiet sun-drenched university library. Blogger ditches smartphone for dedicated music player to focus. [Cinematography] Whispering to camera selfie POV, over-the-shoulder shots, macro close-ups on Y1 interface, soft background blur. [Lighting] Soft diffused daylight streaming through windows. Palette: Serene whites, warm beiges, soft greens, earthy wood. 5500K. [Actions] 0-3s Selfie frame, whispering, phone buzzes with notifications, blogger sighs, turns it face down. 3-7s Shows Y1 sliding into slim wallet beside student ID. Flips camera to Y1 screen selecting APE lossless. 7-10s Selfie angle from above, immersed in textbook, Y1 beside book. 10-15s Looks up, stretches, radiant smile, holds Y1 up to lens, nods sharing focus hack. [Audio] VO: "Phone distractions killing focus? Same, babes. I swapped for Y1. Slips in my wallet, 64g. Pure lossless audio, zero notifications. 25 hours study flow. Ace exams in style! Shop now!" SFX: Jarring buzz, satisfying placement, crisp lo-fi beats, soft pencil scratch, page turn.

Prompt 3: The Format Flex [Style] Raw authentic phone footage, casual selfie style, front-facing camera, playful vlog energy, 4K. Ins-style Caucasian female blogger, sharp cat-eye glasses, sleek high ponytail, bold red lips, wearing vintage graphic tee, tech-savvy yet fashionable, confident energy. [Prose] Y1 player: sleek, 64g, crisp touchscreen. Environment: modern minimalist bedroom. Blogger shows off hardcore audio specs stylishly. [Cinematography] Quick rhythmic selfie cuts, flipping camera between face and Y1 screen, whip pans, vlog-style intimacy. [Lighting] Soft ambient room lighting with subtle neon LED accents. Palette: Clean whites, deep blacks, vibrant neon pinks/purples. 5000K. [Actions] 0-3s Selfie frame, holds Y1 next to 8 stacked coins, demonstrating 64g, playful wink. 3-7s Flips camera fast: swiping through FLAC, APE, MP4/MKV 720P video files. 7-10s Y1 screen booting ROCKBOX, flips back to face looking impressed. 10-15s Holds Y1 close to selfie lens, radiant smile, taps screen, points down to link. [Audio] VO: "Think MP3s are basic? Think again, besties. Y1 handles FLAC, APE, 720p video! Runs ROCKBOX. Pocket-sized powerhouse. No format compromise! Get pro sound here!" SFX: Coin clink, fast beat drops, crisp UI taps, video snippet, click.

Prompt 4: The Endless Workout [Style] Raw authentic phone footage, casual selfie style, front-facing camera, sweaty vlog aesthetic, slight movement, 4K. Ins-style Caucasian female blogger, intense blue eyes, tight french braid, dewy sweaty skin, wearing sleek black athleisure, vibrant energy. [Prose] Y1 player: sleek, 64g, crisp touchscreen, 1250mAh battery. Environments: morning outdoor run, high-end gym floor. Blogger needs lightweight, dependable gear. [Cinematography] Dynamic selfie tracking shots, slight bounce while running, macro close-ups of Y1 on waistband, vlog framing. [Lighting] Bright morning sunlight, cool studio gym lighting. Palette: Vibrant activewear colors against sleek black/metallic Y1. 6500K to 5500K. [Actions] 0-3s Selfie frame stretching outdoors, slides Y1 into tight legging pocket, shows no bulk to camera. 3-7s Running selfie, Y1 secure, cut to gym floor doing weights. 7-10s Close-up Y1 screen: full battery icon, adjusts earbuds. 10-15s Post-workout selfie, glowing smile, holds Y1 up, flexes playfully. [Audio] VO: "Phone dies by noon, but I don't stop. Y1 is 64g, slips right in. 25 hours battery means it outlasts me! Lossless tracks for gains. No bulk, just power. Grab yours, babes!" SFX: Rhythmic breathing, upbeat electronic music, subtle clothing rustle, battery chime.这种格式给出最终的prompt，你这里界面展示的逻辑要设置好，让用户一目了然可以看到创意角度和最终的prompt
